message:
fix: bump MSRV to 1.88 and update deps to fix cargo audit vulnerability

- Bump rust-version from 1.85 to 1.88 (CI uses nightly)
- Update time 0.3.45 → 0.3.47 to fix RUSTSEC-2026-0009 (DoS via stack exhaustion)
- Update 39 other transitive deps to latest compatible versions

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
